label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to solve this problem step by step. So, there are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them has a partner at the start of the song. The partners are as follows: - Alice is with Jamie - Bob is with Patrick - Claire is with Ophelia - Dave is with Melissa - Eve is with Rodrigo Now, during the song, they switch partners multiple times. Let me track each switch carefully to see who ends up with whom at the end. First switch: Dave and Bob switch partners. So initially, Dave is with Melissa and Bob is with Patrick. After switching, Dave will be with Patrick, and Bob will be with Melissa. Second switch: Claire and Dave switch partners. Initially, Claire is with Ophelia and Dave is with Patrick (from the first switch). After this switch, Claire will be with Patrick and Dave will be with Ophelia. Third switch: Eve and Alice switch partners. Initially, Eve is with Rodrigo and Alice is with Jamie. After this switch, Eve will be with Jamie and Alice will be with Rodrigo. Fourth switch: Claire and Eve switch partners. At this point, Claire is with Patrick (from the second switch) and Eve is with Jamie (from the third switch). After this switch, Claire will be with Jamie and Eve will be with Patrick. Fifth switch: Alice and Eve switch partners. Currently, Alice is with Rodrigo (from the third switch) and Eve is with Patrick (from the fourth switch). After this switch, Alice will be with Patrick and Eve will be with Rodrigo. So, at the end of the dance, Alice is dancing with Patrick.
